description: The ProtoFluxGlobalRefProxy component allows for a piece of UI to act as a relay for interacting with global value component.

fields.Node: The node that this is on.
fields.ElementName: the name of the target component.
fields.ValueType: The type of the value being held.
fields._label: The field to drive with global value properties to make a name.
fields._proxyVisual: The Button used for the proxy surrounding visual.
fields._refProxySource: The proxy used to get the global ref.
fields.TargetGlobalRef: The target global reference this visual has been made for.
fields._currentProxy: The current proxy this is using.

methods.OnProxyButtonPressed: Called when the proxy button is touched on the visual.

usage: Used in nodes like raw data tool events to show the field for the raw data tool. This is also used to interact with said visual.
